rationale: In the citing PDF, Groening et al. (2016) is used in the measurement section as support for relying on an entropy-based operationalization. That citation is connected to how the authors construct key multichannel usage variables, so it has a concrete methodological function beyond generic background listing. The cited paper is not used for the main theory or hypotheses, which points to methodological transfer rather than conceptual extension.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a measurement approach exemplified by the cited paper by using an entropy-based index to operationalize channel-usage constructs. This is a methodological use in a new B2B multichannel setting, not a direct extension of the cited paper's core theory.
